title: Software Update - DFU - Animations on Software Update screen
scenario: Verify slide animations and animated picture on the Software Update screen during DFU process
steps: Navigate to HS device settings and open SW update tab, click Update button → Software Update screen slides in from the right.
Tap Continue → Three Easy Steps screen slides in from the right.
Tap back arrow → Software Update screen slides in from the left.
On Three Easy Steps screen, tap "Start Update" → Updating screen slides from the right, with an animated picture in the middle.
expected: All screen transitions are smooth and correctly slide in from the expected directions. The animated picture appears on the Updating screen.
